The Artist

Turning Ideas
Into Art

Featured Work

Stone Painting

Hand-painted stones with names, words, and floral motifs — each one unique. Words like HOPE, DREAM, LOVE, FAITH painted in white on dark stone with colourful dot-art flowers.

Order Yours ✦

"Every piece carries a little piece of me — made with patience, love, and the belief that handmade things last forever."

— Anusha Mohan, Made By Hand Studio

How It Works

The Process

01
You Reach Out

Message on WhatsApp with your idea — a name, a design, a theme. We'll discuss what you have in mind.

02
We Design

A custom plan is made for your piece — every detail thought through before crafting begins.

03
Handcrafted

Wire bent, stones painted, pencils carved, miniatures assembled — entirely by hand with care.

04
Delivered

Packaged beautifully and delivered to you — ready to gift, display, or keep forever.

ORDER

Want Something Custom?

Names, messages, portraits, symbols — if you can imagine it, it can be made by hand.

Order Now on WhatsApp ✦
